title: Song To Celia - II by Ben Jonson — Inspirational Poetry Lines
content:
Drink to me only with thine eyes,
   And I will pledge with mine;
Or leave a kiss but in the cup,
   And I'll not look for wine.
The thirst that from the soul doth rise
   Doth ask a drink divine;
But might I of Jove's nectar sup,
   I would not change for thine.
meaning: "Song To Celia - II" by Ben Jonson is a inspirational poem consisting of 17 lines. The poet explores themes of inspirational through vivid imagery and emotional depth. Beginning with "Drink to me only with thine eyes,    And I will pledge with mine;...", this piece captures the essence of human experience and invites reflection on the deeper currents of life and feeling. This work is part of Ben Jonson's celebrated body of poetry that continues to resonate with readers worldwide.
